records.ety: [Vouch + safe, that is, to vouch or answer for safety.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Vouchsafed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Vouchsafing.]

defs: To condescend to grant; to concede; to bestow.
quotes: If ye vouchsafe that it be so.
Shall I vouchsafe your worship a word or two?
It is not said by the apostle that God vouchsafed to the heathens the means of salvation.

defs: To receive or accept in condescension.
To condescend; to deign; to yield; to descend or stoop.
quotes: Vouchsafe, O Lord, to keep us this day without sin.
Vouchsafe, illustrious Ormond, to behold What power the charms of beauty had of old.
